about.title: Experience Excellence
about.subtitle: About Friends Group
about.story_content: Friends Group Spa & Beauty offers an unparalleled experience for both mind and body. Partnering with five-star hotels and employing highly qualified teams, we set international standards in luxury and rejuvenation. Your safety is our priority, backed by comprehensive insurance for total peace of mind.

reliability.title: Elite Reliability
reliability.desc: Secured by a comprehensive million-pound insurance policy.

testimonials.title: What Our Clients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Directly from our Google Business Profile reviews.

items.name: Mohamed Tamir Abdel Rehem
items.text: Very professional team. Great hospitality. Responsible price. Nice experience worth trying.

items.name: J.
items.text: Clean environment and very professional staff. Everyone has a high sense of hospitality and excellence.

items.name: Mathieu007 EGY
items.text: One of the best massages I’ve ever had! The environment is clean, peaceful, and beautifully decorated. A hidden gem worth discovering!

items.name: Hana Tamir
items.text: The experience was really nice. The Paradise Spa treatment was very relaxing and calming. The staff were very friendly and professional.
